summary: EXP-400 implements curmudgeon SEC-8b.3.c4 Hole 2 (moderate) recommendation: tighten SEC-8b.3 L3a closing sentence from "globe-parasitic by construction, by the dome author's own admission" (overstates OPEN-001) to "globe-dependent at the input layer (per OPEN-001) AND at the physical-calibration layer (per WIN-025 globe-fingerprint)."
